notes: Start with 9 types. Grow from real planner failures, not upfront design. When two types fit a sub-question equally well, the planner emits both — multi-label is intentional.

types.description: Build a time-series chart for a metric that does NOT exist as a single pre-aggregated endpoint. Examples: P/E ratio (needs price+revenue merged daily), take rate over time (fees/volume), revenue per user, emissions-adjusted yield. Requires fetching 2+ raw series, merging/computing in execute_code, and rendering a chart. This is distinct from trend-analysis which plots a metric that already exists in one API call.
example_prompts: Chart HYPE P/E ratio over the last 6 months
Build a daily take rate chart for GMX
Plot revenue-per-user over time for Aave
Show me FDV/revenue multiple trend for ENA
Chart emissions cost vs fee revenue for AERO daily
types.typical_sub_shape: Identify the component series needed (e.g. daily price + daily revenue); fetch each from the best source; merge and compute the derived metric row-by-row in execute_code; render as chart artifact.

types.description: Current state of a protocol's headline KPIs: TVL, fees, revenue, mcap/FDV, P/F, P/S, holders, active users. Point-in-time facts, not trends.
example_prompts: What's HYPE's current P/F?
Pull the latest TVL and revenue for Aave
How big is Ethena right now?
types.typical_sub_shape: Get current value of {metric} for {protocol}; compare against 30d/90d baseline.

types.description: How a metric has moved over a window. Charts of TVL/revenue/volume/price over time, deltas, regime shifts. Always a chart artifact.
example_prompts: Show me HYPE volume over the last 90 days
Plot Aave fees since the merge
Chart Ethena's sUSDe supply growth
types.typical_sub_shape: Pull {metric} for {protocol} over {window}; identify inflection points; render chart.

types.description: Net flows, accumulation, deposits/withdrawals, smart-money movement, on-chain activity that signals positioning. Distinct from price/TVL trends — this is about WHO is moving.
example_prompts: Are whales accumulating HYPE?
What does the bridge inflow data say about Hyperliquid?
Where is sUSDe collateral coming from?
types.typical_sub_shape: Identify the relevant on-chain signal; query Dune for flow data; characterize direction and magnitude.

types.description: Forward-looking price/scenario/multiple work. NTM revenue projections, P/E vs comp set, scenario-weighted price targets. Always requires assumptions and a model.
example_prompts: What's HYPE worth at 2x current take rate?
Build me a price target for ENA
Compare LDO and JTO P/F to peers
types.typical_sub_shape: State assumptions explicitly; project forward metric; apply comparable multiple; render scenario table.
types.lens_hint: TopherGMI for valuation framework; thiccyth0t for derivatives revenue modeling.

types.description: How a token captures value: supply schedule, emissions, sinks, fee switch, vote-escrow, staking yield, value-accrual path from protocol revenue to holder. Mechanism design, not market-cap chatter.
example_prompts: How does HYPE accrue value?
Walk me through ENA's fee switch design
What's the unlock schedule for JTO over the next year?
types.typical_sub_shape: Map the full path from protocol activity → token holder; flag every leak (treasury, foundation, LM).

types.description: Side-by-side comparison of N protocols across one or more dimensions. Always produces a comparison table. Distinct from valuation-ask — comp-analysis is about ranking/positioning, valuation is about price.
example_prompts: Compare Aave vs Morpho vs Spark on lending
How does Hyperliquid stack up against dYdX and GMX?
Rank the top 5 LSTs by yield and risk
types.typical_sub_shape: Define the dimensions; pull each metric for each protocol; render comparison table with one-line takeaway.

types.description: What's the market story, why is this thing being talked about, what's the bull/bear case, qualitative thesis work. Pulls heavily from analyst corpus and brain context.
example_prompts: What's the bull case for Monad?
Why is everyone talking about restaking?
What's the bear thesis on ENA right now?
types.typical_sub_shape: Find prevailing narratives in analyst corpus + brain; steelman each side; attribute claims.
types.lens_hint: All three analysts contribute; weight by recency and conviction.

types.description: Open-ended 'evaluate X' / 'tell me about X' / 'deep dive on X' that needs a full multi-step playbook applied. Triggers playbook selection. Almost never a leaf node — this expands into many sub-questions.
example_prompts: Deep dive on Hyperliquid
Build me a thesis on Ethena
Evaluate Monad as an L1 bet
types.typical_sub_shape: Pick the playbook that fits this asset/sector; instantiate each abstract node against the specific subject.
